test_cases.title: TC-1 Happy Path - Daily Data Sync for Träger, Standorten, Gruppen
test_cases.description: Verify that the daily data sync for Träger, Standorten, and Gruppen is successful with all data updated as per the AUGE DB.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Verify the daily sync process is triggered automatically
Check that all Träger data is synchronized correctly
Ensure all Standorten data is updated accurately
Validate the sync for all Gruppen data
Verify no errors occur during the sync
check again
test_cases.expected_result: All Träger, Standorten, and Gruppen data is updated accurately in FMI.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung

test_cases.title: TC-2 Alternative Flow - Träger Exclusion
test_cases.description: Test the scenario where the Träger 'Französisches Lycée' is excluded from the daily sync.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Initiate the daily sync process
Check for the exclusion of 'Französisches Lycée' Träger
Verify that no data from this Träger is updated in FMI
test_cases.expected_result: Data for 'Französisches Lycée' Träger is not synchronized in FMI.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung

test_cases.title: TC-3 Edge Case - Standort Type 'kg' Inactivation
test_cases.description: Test the scenario where a Standort of type 'kg' is marked as inactive in the AUGE DB.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Trigger the daily sync process
Identify a 'kg' type Standort marked as inactive in AUGE DB
Verify that the 'Geschlossen ab/mit' field is updated with the 'inaktiv_ab' date in FMI
test_cases.expected_result: The 'Geschlossen ab/mit' field for the 'kg' Standort is updated correctly in FMI.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung

test_cases.title: TC-4 Error Handling - Daily Sync Failure
test_cases.description: Validate the system's response when an error occurs during the daily data sync process.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Initiate the daily sync to intentionally cause an error
Capture the error message displayed
Verify that the error is logged for the responsible team
test_cases.expected_result: Error message is displayed and logged for the responsible team to investigate.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung

test_cases.title: TC-5 Performance - Large Data Sync
test_cases.description: Test the performance of the system when syncing a large volume of data from AUGE DB to FMI.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Initiate a data sync with a large dataset
Measure the time taken for the sync process
Verify that the system handles the large data efficiently
test_cases.expected_result: The system completes the data sync within an acceptable time frame for a large dataset.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung

test_cases.title: TC-6 Security - Data Validation
test_cases.description: Ensure that all data transferred during the sync process is validated for security purposes.
preconditions: Access to FMI MA 10 Stammdaten Felderliste
steps: Trigger the data sync process
Check for any unauthorized data access
Verify that data integrity is maintained during the sync
test_cases.expected_result: No unauthorized data access or security breaches occur during the sync process.
test_cases.user_story: AUGE DB: täglicher Abgleich der Stammdaten von Träger, Standorten und Gruppen inkl. Schließung
